## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.
Fixes #(issue)

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Configuration change

## How Has This Been Tested?
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `bash scripts/validate.sh` passes
- [ ] Manual testing with a fixture task

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding conventions
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass
- [ ] I have updated documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have checked for and removed any secrets, credentials, or private paths
- [ ] I have verified that no unrelated files are modified

## AI Contribution Disclosure
If this contribution was created with assistance from AI tools, please note:
- [ ] This PR was created with AI assistance
- [ ] All code has been reviewed by a human contributor

## Additional Notes
